rationale: Pre-instantiate every conjunct of the open spec fn `next_ensures` as a tautological implication on both r1 and r2 so the triggers line up syntactically across the two runs, and expose the component-wise decomposition of `EventResults.view()` for z3.  Note: the underlying step relation `HostState::next` is genuinely non-deterministic (it admits the `Stutter` step `pre==post && ios.len()==0` and `receive_packet` has an `okay_to_ignore_packets()` disjunct with `post==pre, out==empty`), so the determinism postcondition is not entailed by the ensures; this prelude provides every sound piece of context that could plausibly close the obligation without resorting to unsound `assume`/`admit`.
